content: I would like anybody who says "bump" in the Q&A channel be reprimanded. With the server growing, behaviour like this can end up drowning out proper discussion and help, purely because of a random vocal minorities trying to get their feedback to be at the top of the forum always.
Don’t know if this is specifically about me, but I only typed bump because it was a forum that had gone over a week without (any) kind of reply/acknowledgment www
I do think forums should be locked/closed after answered though
Also can we have the timezone converter back in event/game news? It was used for a few posts and then randomly stopped, was very helpful

Don't worry, I've just got PTSD of small Dev team project discords getting spammed via bumps every 2 hours.

I'd rather not have that here when everyone is always mad about every character for 2 weeks after release. Until 3 people assemble and use them as intended, and then everyone nods.

Then 2 months later a random CN player climbs the leaderboard with the unit, and everyone goes "how" and goes to figure it out.

This all in combination with each update often breaking some numbers/text tags/and other various playability/readability issues that take priority.

Hello.  Thank you for the suggestions.  Rules and guidelines will be added to this channel, as well as the other channels on the server.  

But just for clarity.  Having a question unanswered within 24 hours and bumping it is quite appropriate, and I agree that bumping it several times within a few hours is extremely unreasonable.
